expected_effect: Preserve the anti-arb gain of the strongest raw split-side branch while smoothing the protective floor and release path.
expected_failure_signature: If the slow floor lags true stress, arb leakage returns; if it stays wide too long, fee drag blocks promotion.
expected_win_condition: Lift mean_edge above 480 without recreating the fee drag of the dead split-side family and while keeping arb_loss_to_retail_gain inside guardrail.
hidden_coupling_removed: Instantaneous shocks should not decide both protective-floor activation and release timing.
rationale: Replace short-horizon event carry with a filtered volatility accumulator that sets the symmetric floor, while a faster side-tax path handles one-sided toxicity.
title: Vol accumulator with side tax relay
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes state semantics to a two-timescale controller before quote assembly rather than reweighting the same additive surface.
